entity.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 and continuing to offer spot and derivatives trading through the kcex.com platform.
entity.notes: Official and independent exchange profiles support the 2021 establishment year and Seychelles registration. KCEX publicly claims multiple foreign regulatory registrations, but HEI has not verified a definitive operating legal entity or each claimed registration in primary registries, so confidence remains medium.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the KCEX brand.

changes.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 and continuing to offer spot and derivatives trading through the kcex.com platform.
changes.notes: Official and independent exchange profiles support the 2021 establishment year and Seychelles registration. KCEX publicly claims multiple foreign regulatory registrations, but HEI has not verified a definitive operating legal entity or each claimed registration in primary registries, so confidence remains medium.

events.title: KCEX was established in 2021
events.description: KCEX was established in 2021 as a Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering spot and derivatives trading.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: About KCEX
evidence.notes: Official company page states that KCEX was established in 2021 and registered in Seychelles.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange profile for KCEX
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the 2021 establishment year and Seychelles registration.

evidence.title: KCEX official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current KCEX identity and active trading interface.
